lines.text_source: Hm. It really isn't moving... It must be broken\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.intent: constatar que o moinho está quebrado
lines.base_translation: Hm. Realmente não se move... Deve estar quebrado\n

lines.text_source: after all, then.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: afinal de contas.

lines.text_source: Having given up trying to get the mill moving, Kuon\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: narrar ação de Kuon examinando as engrenagens
lines.base_translation: Tendo desistido de fazer o moinho funcionar, Kuon\n

lines.text_source: mutters to herself, peering at the gears.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: resmunge para si, examinando as engrenagens.

lines.text_source: Ah, so this thing's gotta be the buhrstone mill for\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Ah, então isso aqui deve ser o moinho de amam para\n

lines.text_source: grinding... And this must be the mortar.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: moer... E isso deve ser o pilão.

lines.text_source: I think I get it. The waterwheel rotates the rod,\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Acho que entendi. A roda d'água gira o eixo,\n

lines.text_source: which turns the gears, which move the mill.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: que move as engrenagens, que movem o moinho.

lines.text_source: Seems like it's busted at the moment, though.\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: constatar que está quebrado no momento
lines.base_translation: Parece que está com defeito agora, porém.\n

lines.text_source: How am I supposed to move this thing?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Como é que eu vou mover essa coisa?

lines.text_source: That's just how the pieces fall, I guess. Haku, I'm\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: É o que tem, acho. Haku, vou precisar que você\n

lines.text_source: going to have you turn the amam-grinding stone.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: gire a pedra de moer o amam.

lines.text_source: Turn? Wait, you mean...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Girar? Espera, quer dizer...

lines.text_source: I'll show you. First, take amam from the bag and\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Vou te mostrar. Primeiro, tire o amam do saco e\n

lines.text_source: pour it into the mill...
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: coloque no moinho...

lines.text_source: Kuon opens one of the sacks lying piled in the\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: narrar ação de Kuon abrindo o saco
lines.base_translation: Kuon abre um dos sacos empilhados no canto,\n

lines.text_source: corner, pouring its contents out into the mortar.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: despejando o conteúdo dentro do pilão.

lines.text_source: And then... you turn the mill.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: E então... você gira o moinho.

lines.text_source: She grabs ahold of a handle jutting from the round\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Ela agarra a manivela que sai da pedra redonda\n

lines.text_source: millstone and gives a small, almost casual push...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: narrar o empurrão leve de Kuon
lines.base_translation: do moinho e dá um empurrão leve, quase casual...

lines.text_source: *GRRRRNGGKK*
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: som do moinho girando com força
lines.base_translation: *RRRRRRONCCCC*
lines.risk_notes: Onomatopeia localizada para pt-BR mantendo impacto sonoro

lines.text_source: The mill spins with unreasonable force for that tiny\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: descrever o moinho girando com força desproporcional
lines.base_translation: O moinho gira com força absurda para um empurrão\n

lines.text_source: push, grinding and crushing the amam into powder.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: tão leve, moendo e triturando o amam em pó.

lines.text_source: Ah, maybe I put my back into that one a little much.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Ah, talvez eu tenha me empenhado um pouco demais.

lines.text_source: A little much!? Wait, is something b--is that SMOKE?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: reagir com espanto ao excesso de Kuon
lines.base_translation: Um pouco!? Espera, tem algo que-- isso é FUMAÇA?

lines.text_source: Lo and behold, the friction of all that force\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: descrever a fumaça causada pelo atrito
lines.base_translation: De fato, o atrito de toda aquela força\n

lines.text_source: created smoke, gently rising from the mill.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: gerou fumaça, subindo suavemente do moinho.

lines.text_source: Give it a try, in any case.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Tente você também, enfim.

lines.text_source: Like hell I'll be able to do that! Where do you even\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Nem por sonho! De onde você tira força pra uma\n

lines.text_source: get the strength for something like this?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: coisa dessas?

lines.text_source: But if I recall... You're supposed to walk in a\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: lembrar como usar o moinho corretamente
lines.base_translation: Mas se bem me lembro... Você deve andar em\n

lines.text_source: circle with the handle to get the mill going, right?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: círculo com a manivela pra girar o moinho, né?

lines.text_source: I may not be able to do it like her, but getting it\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Talvez eu não consiga fazer igual a ela, mas fazer\n

lines.text_source: spinning should be an easy enough task.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: girar deve ser tarefa fácil o suficiente.

lines.text_source: I'd prefer not to work, but I should show my\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Prefiro não trabalhar, mas devo mostrar minha\n

lines.text_source: gratitude. I take the handle and begin to push.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: gratidão. Pego a manivela e começo a empurrar.

lines.text_source: Alley-oop.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Eia!

lines.text_source: *Grrrrrk*...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: som do moinho girando com esforço
lines.base_translation: *Rrrrrrc*...

lines.text_source: Not exactly light, but... I think I can handle this.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: constatar que consegue mover o moinho
lines.base_translation: Não é leve, mas... acho que dá pra aguentar.

lines.text_source: I mean--how useless would I be if I couldn't? She\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Quer dizer-- que inútil eu seria se não desse? Ela\n

lines.text_source: can't be expecting me to screw this up, right?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: não pode estar esperando que eu fuce isso, né?

lines.text_source: Excellent. You shouldn't have any problems, I think.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Ótimo. Não deve ter nenhum problema, acho.

lines.text_source: I have some errands to tend to, so you'll be all\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.intent: avisar que vai sair para recados
lines.base_translation: Tenho uns recados a fazer, então você fica bem\n

lines.text_source: right if I leave you alone here, right, Haku?
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.intent: confirmar que pode deixar Haku sozinho
lines.base_translation: sozinho aqui, né, Haku?

lines.text_source: Yeah. I just need to grind this stuff into powder,\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Sim. Só preciso moer isso tudo em pó,\n

lines.text_source: right?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: né?

lines.text_source: Uh huh. I'll leave you to it, then.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Isso. Deixo você com isso, então.

lines.text_source: Welp. Might as well get this over with.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: se preparar mentalmente para o trabalho chato
lines.base_translation: Bom. Melhor acabar logo com isso.

lines.text_source: Push, push, puuuuuuuuush...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: descrever o giro monótono do moinho
lines.base_translation: Gira, gira, giraaaaaaaaaa...

lines.text_source: *Grrrrrrrrrrrrrk*...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: *Rrrrrrrrrrrrc*...

lines.text_source: Spin, spin, keep on spinning...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Roda, roda, continua rodando...

lines.text_source: *Grrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrk*...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: *Rrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrc*...

lines.text_source: Don't get me wrong; I'm glad it's not strenuous,\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Não me entendam mal; fico feliz que não seja pesado,\n

lines.text_source: but man, I'm bored. This is monotonous work.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: mas caramba, que tédio. Que trabalho monótono.

lines.text_source: *Grrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrk*...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: *Rrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrc*...

lines.text_source: Not to mention this thing is barely putting out any\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Sem contar que isso aqui mal produz\n

lines.text_source: powder at all. It took no time at all for Kuon...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: comparar com a velocidade de Kuon
lines.base_translation: pó nenhum. Pra Kuon não demorou nada...

lines.text_source: This is gonna take forever, at this rate. I should\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Vai demorar uma eternidade nesse ritmo. Preciso\n

lines.text_source: pick up the pace.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: acelerar o passo.

lines.text_source: *Grrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrk...!*
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: *Rrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrc...!*

lines.text_source: Phew, first bag down...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Ufa, primeiro saco pronto...

lines.text_source: Well... Time to take a break.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Bom... Hora de dar uma pausa.

lines.text_source: Hup--whew...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Aí-- ufa...

lines.text_source: Geez. All that for ONE bag! All that work, and I've\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: lamentar a quantidade de trabalho restante
lines.base_translation: Puxa. Tudo isso por UM saco! Todo esse trabalho, e\n

lines.text_source: only finished the first little bit!? Come on!
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: só terminei o primeirinho!? Sério!

lines.text_source: Gah. There's no way I'm getting all this done.\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: perceber que não vai conseguir terminar
lines.base_translation: Ah. Não tem como terminar tudo isso.\n

lines.text_source: I was way too optimistic. What am I gonna do?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Fui otimista demais. O que é que eu faço?

lines.text_source: My legs have turned to jelly, my feet are\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: descrever o estado físico de cansaço
lines.base_translation: Minhas pernas viraram gelatina, os pés estão\n

lines.text_source: blistering, the boredom is killing me...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: cheios de bolhas, o tédio me mata...

lines.text_source: Why the hell do I need to turn this thing all day\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: questionar por que precisa fazer isso o dia todo
lines.base_translation: Por que diabos preciso girar essa coisa o dia todo\n

lines.text_source: like I'm livestock or something, anyway?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: feito um animal de carga, afinal?

lines.text_source: I wouldn't even have to do this if they'd fixed\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Nem precisaria fazer isso se eles tivessem\n

lines.text_source: their damn mill in the first place.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: consertado o maldito moinho logo.

lines.text_source: Laying on the ground, I glance toward the system of\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: narrar que está olhando para as engrenagens
lines.base_translation: Deitado no chão, olho para o sistema de\n

lines.text_source: gears connected to the mill.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: engrenagens conectado ao moinho.

lines.text_source: They said something like... the repairman hasn't\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: lembrar que o consertador não veio
lines.base_translation: Disseram algo como... o consertador ainda não\n

lines.text_source: come yet, but it's not like mills are complicated.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: veio, mas moinho não é tão complicado assim.

lines.text_source: If someone had the mind to do it, I'm sure they\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Se alguém tivesse disposição pra isso, tenho certeza\n

lines.text_source: could--eh?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: daria--eh?

lines.text_source: That's it! All I've gotta do is fix this thing.\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: ter ideia de consertar o moinho
lines.base_translation: É isso! Só preciso consertar essa coisa.\n

lines.text_source: Why didn't I think of that? It's so obvious!
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Como não pensei nisso antes? É tão óbvio!

lines.text_source: I pick myself up and set about examining the\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: narrar que começou a examinar o moinho
lines.base_translation: Me levanto e começo a examinar\n

lines.text_source: structure of the mill.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: a estrutura do moinho.

lines.text_source: Carefully, I scrutinize each part in sequence,\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Com cuidado, examino cada parte em sequência,\n

lines.text_source: finally coming to a gear that feels... off.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: até chegar a uma engrenagem que parece... estranha.

lines.text_source: ...Yeah, this is the one. The gear for the grinding\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: ...É essa. A engrenagem da pedra de moer\n

lines.text_source: stone cracked and got stuck. No wonder it won't move.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: trincou e travou. Não é à toa que não funciona.

lines.text_source: Now, what to do? If the gear itself is broken, is\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: E agora, o que fazer? Se a engrenagem em si está\n

lines.text_source: there anything I can... hm?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: quebrada, tem como eu... hm?

lines.text_source: This is... Ah, now that I look closely, the\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Isso é... Ah, olhando de perto assim, o\n

lines.text_source: mechanism for the mortar is exactly the same.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: mecanismo do pilão é exatamente igual.

lines.text_source: If that's the case, can I just pull a gear that's\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: planejar usar engrenagem do outro mecanismo
lines.base_translation: Se for assim, posso pegar uma engrenagem que\n

lines.text_source: not in use from another part of the machine...?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: não está em uso de outra parte da máquina...?

lines.text_source: *Crrk*...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: *Crec*...

lines.text_source: If I drop that right in here, it should spin...\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Se eu colocar bem aqui, deve girar...\n

lines.text_source: Probably.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Provável.

lines.text_source: *THUNK*
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: *TUM*

lines.text_source: I slide off the broken gear and replace it with\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Retiro a engrenagem quebrada e a substituo por\n

lines.text_source: another one of the same size.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: outra do mesmo tamanho.

lines.text_source: ...I know this was my idea, but wow. I wasn't\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: ficar surpreso com o encaixe perfeito
lines.base_translation: ...Sei que foi ideia minha, mas uau. Não\n

lines.text_source: expecting it to fit so perfectly.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: esperava encaixar tão perfeitamente assim.

lines.text_source: The gear from the other mechanism is just the right\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: constatar que a engrenagem encaixou e questionar
lines.base_translation: A engrenagem do outro mecanismo é exatamente do\n

lines.text_source: size. Did no one else really think of this?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: tamanho certo. Será que ninguém pensou nisso?

lines.text_source: Whatever. No way to know until I test it out.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Tanto faz. Só saberei testando.

lines.text_source: Moving over to the window, I find the rope holding\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: ir até a janela para soltar a roda d'água
lines.base_translation: Indo até a janela, encontro a corda que prende\n

lines.text_source: the waterwheel in place and untie it.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: a roda d'água no lugar e a desato.

lines.text_source: *Grrrk*...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: *Rrrrc*...

lines.text_source: *Grrk*...\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: *Rrrc*...\n

lines.text_source: *CLANK*\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: *CLONC*\n

lines.text_source: *Groan*...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: *Rangeee*...

lines.text_source: With a loud sound, the axle in the center slowly\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: descrever o eixo começando a girar
lines.base_translation: Com um som alto, o eixo no centro lentamente\n

lines.text_source: begins to rotate...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: começa a girar...

lines.text_source: The gears follow suit, and finally, the mill starts\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: As engrenagens seguem, e por fim o moinho começa\n

lines.text_source: to move as well.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: a se mover também.

lines.text_source: *Gr-Grrrrrrrrrk*...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: *Rr-Rrrrrrrrrrc*...

lines.text_source: Oh... Hey, all right, we've got movement.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Oh... Ei, tá funcionando. Consegui.

lines.text_source: The amam inside the mill falls out in a steady\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: descrever o amam saindo em pó
lines.base_translation: O amam dentro do moinho sai em um fio\n

lines.text_source: stream of fine powder.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: constante de pó fino.

lines.text_source: Yes! Success! Now all I have to do is sit and reap\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Sim! Consegui! Agora é só sentar e aproveitar\n

lines.text_source: the rewards.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: os resultados.

lines.text_source: I sit back down on the floor and kick my feet up\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Volto a sentar no chão e estico as pernas\n

lines.text_source: for a nice, long, well-deserved break.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: para uma boa e merecida pausa longa.

lines.text_source: *Grrrrrrrrk*...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: *Rrrrrrrrrrc*...

lines.text_source: The mill continually spins before me, quickly\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: O moinho gira sem parar à minha frente, superando\n

lines.text_source: overtaking my efforts from before. It's amam\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: meus esforços anteriores com folga. Um mar de\n

lines.text_source: powder city.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: pó de amam.

lines.text_source: I figure if it keeps this pace up, I should be done\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: calcular que vai terminar até a noite
lines.base_translation: Acho que se continuar nesse ritmo, devo terminar\n

lines.text_source: by nightfall.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: até a noite.

lines.text_source: Really, I should have done this from the st--
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: reconhecer que devia ter feito isso antes
lines.base_translation: Sério, devia ter feito isso desde o começo--

lines.text_source: Footsteps from outside interrupt my thoughts.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Passos lá fora interrompem meus pensamentos.

lines.text_source: Acting on reflex and instinct, I quickly stand and\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: narrar que se levanta por reflexo
lines.base_translation: Por reflexo e instinto, me levanto rápido e\n

lines.text_source: move to the mill.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: corro para o moinho.

lines.text_source: Haku, everything going all right in here?
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Haku, tudo certo por aqui?

lines.text_source: Just as I reach the mill, Kuon pokes her head in,\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Bem quando chego ao moinho, Kuon enfia a cabeça\n

lines.text_source: holding a tray in her hands.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: para dentro, segurando uma bandeja.

lines.text_source: Ungh!? O-Oh, yeah. Doing great.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: confirmar que está bem de forma suspeita
lines.base_translation: Nngh!? A-Ah, sim. Tudo ótimo.

lines.text_source: For some reason, I find myself with my hands around\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: narrar que está fingindo empurrar o moinho
lines.base_translation: Por algum motivo, me vejo com as mãos na\n

lines.text_source: the handle, "pushing" the freely rotating mill.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: manivela, "empurrando" o moinho que gira livre.

lines.text_source: Why am I acting like a kid trying to hide shirking\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: questionar por que age como criança escondendo preguiça
lines.base_translation: Por que estou agindo feito criança escondendo\n

lines.text_source: his homework from his parents?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: a preguiça dos pais?

lines.text_source: Ahaha, looks like it's going well, I guess.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Ahaha, parece que está indo bem.

lines.text_source: Well, this is--
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: quase revelar que consertou o moinho
lines.base_translation: Bom, isso aqui é--

lines.text_source: ...Wait. Hold up.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: ...Espera. Calma.

lines.text_source: I catch myself just as I'm about to explain to Kuon\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: narrar que quase revelou a verdade
lines.base_translation: Me pego bem na hora em que ia explicar a Kuon\n

lines.text_source: how I swapped in an auxiliary gear, pausing.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: que troquei a engrenagem auxiliar, e paro.

lines.text_source: If the mill is repaired, there's no point to me\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: perceber que se o moinho está consertado não precisa mais ficar
lines.base_translation: Se o moinho está consertado, não tem sentido\n

lines.text_source: spinning this stupid thing.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: eu ficar girando essa coisa idiota.

lines.text_source: Which means I wouldn't have to be here, and Kuon\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: O que significa que não precisaria ficar aqui, e Kuon\n

lines.text_source: would just find another job for me to do, right?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: ia me dar outro serviço pra fazer, né?

lines.text_source: Thinking back, I recall the conversation Kuon had\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: lembrar conversa de Kuon com a estalajadeira
lines.base_translation: Lembrando, me recordo da conversa que Kuon teve\n

lines.text_source: with the innkeeper...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: com a estalajadeira...

lines.text_source: Innkeeper
lines.speaker: Sistema
lines.base_translation: Estalajad.

lines.text_source: There's help needed, hm... cutting stones at the\n
lines.speaker: Estalajadeira
lines.base_translation: Precisa-se de ajuda, hm... corte de pedras na\n

lines.text_source: quarry, and hauling fresh lumber. How's that sound?
lines.speaker: Estalajadeira
lines.base_translation: pedreira, e transporte de madeira. Que tal?

lines.text_source: No, no, no. No more. I've had my fill. I reject,\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Não, não, não. Chega. Estou satisfeito. Rejeito,\n

lines.text_source: I renounce, I REFUSE this "work"...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: renuncio, RECUSO esse "trabalho"...

lines.text_source: Guess there's no choice. Kinda sucks lying to her,\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Não tem jeito. É chato mentir pra ela,\n

lines.text_source: but I'm gonna pretend I'm working for now.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: mas vou fingir que estou trabalhando por ora.

lines.text_source: Kuon doesn't seem to catch on, for she steps inside\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: narrar que Kuon entra sem desconfiar
lines.base_translation: Kuon não parece perceber nada, pois entra\n

lines.text_source: and sits on a bench with her tray, tail curling.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: e senta num banco com a bandeja, cauda se enrolando.

lines.text_source: You're probably tired from all that work. I brought\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Você deve estar cansado de tanto trabalho. Trouxe\n

lines.text_source: some tea. C'mon, come take a break with me.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: um chá. Vem, descansa um pouco comigo.

lines.text_source: Wh--?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Qu--?

lines.text_source: Two cups sit perched on the tray, warm steam rising\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Duas xícaras repousam na bandeja, com vapor\n

lines.text_source: from their depths.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: quente subindo delas.

lines.text_source: ...Not good.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: perceber que está numa situação ruim
lines.base_translation: ...Ruim.

lines.text_source: If I let go now, this thing is gonna keep moving on\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: calcular que o moinho vai trair a farsa
lines.base_translation: Se eu soltar agora, essa coisa vai continuar\n

lines.text_source: its own, and it'll be a dead giveaway.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: sozinha, e vai ser flagrante.

lines.text_source: Is something wrong?
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Algum problema?

lines.text_source: Uh, no, just... I'll be done with this bag in a bit,\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Ah, não, só... Termino esse saco daqui a pouco,\n

lines.text_source: so I'll stop for a break then.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: então paro pra descansar.

lines.text_source: Your tea's going to get cold, th--\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.intent: avisar que o chá vai esfriar
lines.base_translation: Seu chá vai esfriar, se--\n

lines.text_source: ...No, you shouldn't push yourself so hard. You've\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.intent: insistir para Haku não se esforçar demais
lines.base_translation: ...Não, não precisa se forçar tanto. Você\n

lines.text_source: only just recovered...
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: acabou de se recuperar...

lines.text_source: You really should take a small break for your\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Você realmente devia dar uma pausinha pela\n

lines.text_source: health, you know. I can switch with you for a bit.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: sua saúde. Posso te substituir por um tempo.

lines.text_source: Huh? Uh... um. No thanks. This is my job, after all.\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Hein? Ah... bom. Não, obrigado. É meu trabalho, afinal.\n

lines.text_source: Mhm. Yep.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Mhm. Sim.

lines.text_source: ...She'll definitely figure me out if we switch off.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: perceber que será desmascarado se Kuon substituir
lines.base_translation: ...Ela vai me pegar na hora se trocarmos.

lines.text_source: You're sure you're not pushing yourself over your\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.intent: questionar se Haku está forçando seus limites
lines.base_translation: Tem certeza que não está forçando além\n

lines.text_source: limit?
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: limite?

lines.text_source: O-Of course not.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: C-Claro que não.

lines.text_source: Well, if you say so. I suppose it was rude of me to\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Bom, se você diz. Acho que foi indelicado da minha\n

lines.text_source: interrupt while you're working so hard.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: parte interromper enquanto trabalha tanto.

lines.text_source: Kuon smiles, taking a delicate sip of her own tea.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Kuon sorri, tomando um gole delicado do seu chá.

lines.text_source: Hmhm. I have to say, I'm a little relieved.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Hmhm. Devo dizer que estou um pouco aliviada.

lines.text_source: A-About what?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: A-About o quê?

lines.text_source: I was a little worried you were going to starve to\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.intent: explicar que estava preocupada que Haku fosse morrer de fome
lines.base_translation: Estava um pouco preocupada que você fosse morrer\n

lines.text_source: death, the way you were carrying on.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: de fome, do jeito que estava.

lines.text_source: Huh?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Hein?

lines.text_source: You were so weak. I wasn't sure if you were going\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Você estava tão fraco. Não sabia se você ia\n

lines.text_source: to survive.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: sobreviver.

lines.text_source: ...What? Was I really in that dire a situation?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: questionar se estava tão mal assim
lines.base_translation: ...O quê? Eu estava mesmo numa situação tão grave?

lines.text_source: I didn't think it was THAT bad.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Não achei que fosse TÃO sério assim.

lines.text_source: You were struggling to carry loads even children\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.intent: descrever a fraqueza de Haku com exemplos
lines.base_translation: Você mal conseguia carregar o que crianças\n

lines.text_source: could handle. You could barely walk with them, even.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: carregam. Mal andava com elas no colo.

lines.text_source: In a weakened state like that, I was worried you'd\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Naquele estado tão fraco, fiquei com medo de que\n

lines.text_source: be no good for manual labor.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: você não servisse para trabalho manual.

lines.text_source: Your hands look very clean, too. I expect you've\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.intent: notar que as mãos de Haku são limpas demais
lines.base_translation: Suas mãos são muito limpas. Aposto que nunca\n

lines.text_source: never held a hoe, let alone done any hunting.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: segurou uma enxada, menos ainda caçou.

lines.text_source: Urgh...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Argh...

lines.text_source: Does she really think I'm that hopeless? Are my\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: questionar se Kuon realmente o acha inútil
lines.base_translation: Ela realmente me acha tão sem jeito assim? Minha\n

lines.text_source: circumstances really THAT bad?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: situação é MESMO tão ruim assim?

lines.text_source: But judging by how you're doing with that mill,\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.intent: observar que Haku se recuperou pelo desempenho no moinho
lines.base_translation: Mas pelo jeito que está indo com o moinho,\n

lines.text_source: I guess your body was just recovering.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: acho que seu corpo estava só se recuperando.

lines.text_source: Seeing you back at full strength is really\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.intent: expressar alívio ao ver Haku bem
lines.base_translation: Ver você de volta à plena forma é muito\n

lines.text_source: relieving.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: reconfortante.

lines.text_source: I-I see...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: A-Ah é...

lines.text_source: W-Well now what do I do? I can't just ruin\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: não saber o que fazer após a gentileza de Kuon
lines.base_translation: B-Bem, e agora? Não posso simplesmente arruinar\n

lines.text_source: everything she just said and tell her the truth,\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: tudo que ela disse e contar a verdade,\n

lines.text_source: now...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: agora...

lines.text_source: *Grrrrrrrk*...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: *Rrrrrrrrc*...

lines.text_source: Crap, I'm getting really tired. I actually DO want\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: admitir que está cansado e quer parar
lines.base_translation: Droga, estou ficando bem cansado. Realmente QUERO\n

lines.text_source: to take a break, but I can't while Kuon's here.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: parar, mas não posso enquanto Kuon está aqui.

lines.text_source: I feel like I'm being ungrateful by deceiving her,\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Me sinto ingrato por estar enganando ela assim,\n

lines.text_source: but I'm really at my limit here.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: mas estou no meu limite mesmo.

lines.text_source: H-Hey, Kuon. I think I can handle this by myself, so\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: tentar convencer Kuon a ir embora
lines.base_translation: H-Ei, Kuon. Acho que consigo me virar sozinho, então\n

lines.text_source: if you have other stuff to do, don't wait up.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: se tiver outras coisas pra fazer, pode ir.

lines.text_source: Hm. I... I suppose you're right, but I don't feel\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Hm. Eu... Acho que tem razão, mas não fico bem\n

lines.text_source: good leaving you all alone, I guess.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: te deixando sozinho assim.

lines.text_source: You don't trust me much, do you?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Você não confia muito em mim, não é?

lines.text_source: Ngh. Did she figure out that I'm trying not to work?\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Ngh. Será que ela descobriu que estou tentando não trabalhar?\n

lines.text_source: Please, just take the out and go. Please.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: implorar mentalmente que Kuon aceite e vá
lines.base_translation: Por favor, aproveita a deixa e vai. Por favor.

lines.text_source: It's not that. I'm just worried that if I take my\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.intent: explicar que teme Haku cair e morrer
lines.base_translation: Não é isso. Só temo que se tirar meus olhos\n

lines.text_source: eyes off you, you might just fall down and die.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: de você, pode cair e morrer.

lines.text_source: Come on, even I'm... h-hah... hah.\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: defender sua resistência enquanto se cansa
lines.base_translation: Mas veja, até eu... h-hah... hah.\n

lines.text_source: I'm not that weak...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Não sou tão fraco...

lines.text_source: ...I think?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: ...Acho.

lines.text_source: As the one who took you in, it's my duty\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.intent: afirmar dever como quem o acolheu
lines.base_translation: Como quem te acolheu, é meu dever\n

lines.text_source: to see to your health.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: cuidar da sua saúde.

lines.text_source: If I'm not capable of doing that, then it was wrong\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.intent: dizer que foi errado tê-lo trazido se não puder cuidar
lines.base_translation: Se não sou capaz disso, então foi errado\n

lines.text_source: of me to bring you along back there.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: ter te trazido comigo lá atrás.

lines.text_source: Hah... h-hahh... It's... nice to hear you say that,\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: agradecer mas pedir que não se preocupe tanto
lines.base_translation: Hah... h-hahh... É... fico feliz que diga isso,\n

lines.text_source: but I'm not too comfortable with so much worrying.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: mas tanto cuidado me deixa desconfortável.

lines.text_source: I'm sure you're busy. Don't let me keep you.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Tenho certeza que está ocupada. Não me prenda aqui.

lines.text_source: Really? Well, if you insist, I'll be on my way.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: É? Bom, se insiste, já vou saindo.

lines.text_source: Kuon sets down her cup and gracefully stands.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Kuon pousa sua xícara e se levanta elegantemente.

lines.text_source: Just remember, don't overdo it, OK? Take breaks\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Lembre-se, não exagere, tá? Faça pausas\n

lines.text_source: every once in a while.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: de vez em quando.

lines.text_source: All right, understood.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Tudo bem, entendido.

lines.text_source: I get it, so would you please go so I actually CAN\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: pedir mentalmente que Kuon vá logo
lines.base_translation: Entendi, então vai logo pra eu poder\n

lines.text_source: take a break?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: descansar!

lines.text_source: Good!
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Ótimo!

lines.text_source: Bhhaahhh...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: desabafar com alívio após a saída de Kuon
lines.base_translation: Bhhaahhh...

lines.text_source: Once I'm sure Kuon is out of earshot, I crumple to\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Quando tenho certeza que Kuon saiu do alcance do\n

lines.text_source: the ground beneath the mill.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: ouvido, caio no chão embaixo do moinho.

lines.text_source: Phew. Somehow, I managed to play it off. I feel\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Ufa. De algum modo, consegui enganar ela. Me sinto\n

lines.text_source: guilty, but I'll worry about that later.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: culpado, mas vou me preocupar com isso depois.

lines.text_source: I guess I'll grab some tea before--
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Vou pegar aquele chá antes--

lines.text_source: Oh, Haku?
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Oh, Haku?

lines.text_source: Nghyaaah!?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Ngyaaaah!?

lines.text_source: I jump back on the mill in the nick of time.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: narrar que correu de volta ao moinho
lines.base_translation: Pulo de volta para o moinho em cima da hora.

lines.text_source: It's probably a little cold now, but the tea...\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Provavelmente já esfriou um pouco, mas o chá...\n

lines.text_source: Is... Is something wrong?
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Está... Está tudo bem?

lines.text_source: N-Nope. Nothing. Nothing at all.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: N-Não. Nada. Nada mesmo.

lines.text_source: Really? Well, it's important to stay hydrated. Drink\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: É? Bom, é importante se hidratar. Beba\n

lines.text_source: the tea when you can.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: o chá quando puder.

lines.text_source: Yeah, understood.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Sim, entendido.

lines.text_source: OK, keep up the good work.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: OK, continue o bom trabalho.

lines.text_source: This time, I keep my ears open for any unusual\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: ficar atento a sons desta vez
lines.base_translation: Desta vez, fico atento a qualquer som\n

lines.text_source: sounds.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: incomum.

lines.text_source: Kuon's footsteps slowly grow more and more distant\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: ouvir os passos de Kuon se afastando
lines.base_translation: Os passos de Kuon vão ficando cada vez mais\n

lines.text_source: until--finally--I can't hear them any more.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: distantes até-- finalmente-- não ouço mais.

lines.text_source: Geez... thought my heart was gonna leap right out of\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Puxa... achei que meu coração ia saltar pela\n

lines.text_source: my chest.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: garganta.

lines.text_source: I wipe the sweat from my brow and regard the mill.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: enxugar o suor e olhar para o moinho
lines.base_translation: Enxugo o suor da testa e encaro o moinho.

lines.text_source: What do I do now, though? I have no way of telling\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: pensar em como acabar mais rápido
lines.base_translation: Mas o que eu faço agora? Não tenho como saber\n

lines.text_source: when Kuon will be back, or when this will be done.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: quando Kuon vai voltar, nem quando isso vai acabar.

lines.text_source: There's gotta be a way to wrap this up faster. Maybe\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: pensar em como acelerar o processo
lines.base_translation: Tem que ter um jeito de acabar mais rápido. Talvez\n

lines.text_source: if I get the mill to turn more quickly...?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: se eu fizer o moinho girar mais rápido...?

lines.text_source: Once again, I examine each part of the mechanism in\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Mais uma vez, examino cada parte do mecanismo\n

lines.text_source: sequence, trying to puzzle out my dilemma.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: em sequência, tentando resolver meu dilema.

lines.text_source: If I want to increase the grinding speed, I could\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Se quero aumentar a velocidade de moagem, posso\n

lines.text_source: change up the gear ratio. It'd work, in theory.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: mudar a relação de engrenagens. Em teoria, funciona.

lines.text_source: There's a bunch of gears that aren't moving right\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Tem um monte de engrenagens que não estão girando\n

lines.text_source: now, anyway. If I just swap those in...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: agora. Se eu só trocar essas...

lines.text_source: Brain, buddy, you are on point today.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Cérebro, meu parceiro, você está afiado hoje.

lines.text_source: It took some trial and error, but sure enough, I got\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: narrar sucesso após tentativa e erro
lines.base_translation: Foi na tentativa e erro, mas consegui\n

lines.text_source: the gears rearranged successfully.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: rearranjar as engrenagens com sucesso.

lines.text_source: As the last gear slots into place, another loud\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: descrever o moinho voltando a funcionar
lines.base_translation: Quando a última engrenagem encaixa, um barulhão\n

lines.text_source: THUNK heralds the mill groaning to life once more.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: anuncia o moinho rugindo de volta à vida.

lines.text_source: *Grrrk*... *Rrr*... *Grrrrrrrk*...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: *Rrrc*... *Rrr*... *Rrrrrrrc*...

lines.text_source: Woah... Nice, it's going at quite a clip.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Uau... Ótimo, está indo bem rápido.

lines.text_source: The axle--and the gears, and the mill--turn the stone\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: descrever o eixo e engrenagens acelerados
lines.base_translation: O eixo-- e as engrenagens, e o moinho-- giram a pedra\n

lines.text_source: much faster than before.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: muito mais rápido do que antes.

lines.text_source: More amam turns to powder with each rhythmic\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Mais amam vira pó a cada rotação\n

lines.text_source: rotation of the mill.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: rítmica do moinho.

lines.text_source: All right, this should... double? No, triple my\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Beleza, isso deve... dobrar? Não, triplicar meu\n

lines.text_source: output.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: o ritmo.

lines.text_source: All I've gotta do is keep throwing amam into this\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: planejar só jogar amam no moinho
lines.base_translation: Só preciso ficar colocando amam nessa\n

lines.text_source: thing.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: coisa.

lines.text_source: Oh, right. The tea. Kuon went through the trouble,\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Ah, certo. O chá. Kuon foi ao trabalho de fazer,\n

lines.text_source: so I should drink some. Probably cold now...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: então devo beber. Provavelmente frio agora...

lines.text_source: Footsteps!?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Passos!?

lines.text_source: Footfalls sound closer and closer, so I quickly jump\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Os passos ficam cada vez mais próximos, então pulo\n

lines.text_source: back on the mill handle.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: de volta na manivela do moinho.

lines.text_source: *FWUP*
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: *FUP*

lines.text_source: Nngh!?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: reagir à velocidade do moinho acelerado
lines.base_translation: Nngh!?

lines.text_source: As I get my grip on the handle, I can feel the\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: descrever que o moinho acelerado o puxa
lines.base_translation: Quando agarro a manivela, sinto o moinho acelerado\n

lines.text_source: sped-up mill pulling me along. I have to run to\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: me puxando junto. Tenho que correr pra acompanhar.\n

lines.text_source: keep up.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: acompanhar.

lines.text_source: Argh, too fast!
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Argh, rápido demais!

lines.text_source: I try to slow myself down, but I can't with the\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Tento diminuir o ritmo, mas não consigo com o\n

lines.text_source: momentum. Trying to stop just ends in getting\n
